transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverside Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez. Something came up on Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your appointment?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Melissa Turner, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Melissa. I see your appointment with Dr. Alvarez this Thursday at 2:15 PM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do next Tuesday, maybe in the morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check... I have an opening next Tuesday at 9:30 AM. Would that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've moved your appointment to Tuesday, June 11th at 9:30 AM with Dr. Alvarez. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Melissa. Is there anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Have a good day.
